Monster-in-Law (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $82,931,301Details
International Box Office $73,000,000
Worldwide Box Office $155,931,301
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$23,105,133 (27.9% of total gross)
Legs:3.59 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:53.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$45,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,424 opening theaters/3,424 max. theaters, 5.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $154,736,088

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 13th, 2005 (Wide) by New Line
Video Release: August 30th, 2005 by New Line Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sex references and language.
Running Time: 100 minutes
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, In-Laws / Future In-Laws, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Benderspink Productions, Spring Creek Prod
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
